_meta.notes: The First Climber — a child making their first crossing of the Three Notches pass. Their voice is small and untrained. The chorister-ascendant's job is to keep the climber's line in the chant. If the line drops, the child may not finish the climb. Non-recurring; bound to the-pass-bowed beat-pack.

tagline: young, breathless, bowing at the first notch with the wrong angle.
